ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "project_category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., software development, marketing, research) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_number" TEXT /* Number of the milestone (e.g., 1., 2.) */,
  "primary_objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the milestone */,
  "project_deliverable" TEXT /* Project deliverable for the milestone */,
  "achieved" INTEGER /* Whether the milestone has been achieved */,
  "achieved_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "milestone_category" TEXT /* Category of the milestone (e.g., software development, marketing, research) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the milestone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team member, stakeholder) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team member is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project (e.g., developer, tester, analyst) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the team member */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_team_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestone_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestone_comments_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestone_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project at the time of the report (e.g., on track, delayed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the historical record is related to */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical record */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the notification is related to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
